kirundi.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Akarere k'amazi karikira ku mpande zose. Inkomoko z'amazi zikonje kandi zisukuye. Umugezi munini wongeye gutwara amafi. Ibishanga vy'imisamba bikora akazi k'ikibaya c'umwuzure. Uku ni ko gusubirana ku rwego rw'akarere k'amazi bigaragara igihe igihe n'umuryango bihuriye hamwe.
kirundi.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Ibice vyinshi biratera imbere. Bike biracakeneye akazi. Inzira ni nziza kandi umuryango urakora.
kirundi.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Intsinzi zimwe, icuho kimwe. Akazi nyako k'akarere k'amazi gakunda kutaba kimwe; ibice bimwe vyateye imbere mu gihe ibindi vyahagaze.
kirundi.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Ubuziranenge bw'impuzandengo buri hasi kandi ibice bike vyageze ku rwego rwo gusubirana. Uku ni ko uturere tw'amazi twangirika mu ituze igihe imicungire idashobora gukurikirana imitwaro.
kirundi.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Imimerere y'itanguriro isa nk'ishoboka. Koresha Umwaka wa 1 ku gukurikirana siyanse y'abaturage n'uburezi, kubaka inkunga y'umuryango mbere yo kuyikoresha ku bikorwa biteye impaka nko gukuraho urugomero.
kirundi.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Igishushanyo c'icerekezo c'ubuziranenge umwaka ku mwaka hakurikijwe igice c'akarere k'amazi
kirundi.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ Umwigisha w'akarere k'amazi wa AI arimwo gusoma amakuru yawe y'akarere k'amazi...
kirundi.ai_watershed_science_educator: Umwigisha wa siyanse y'akarere k'amazi wa AI.
kirundi.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Si umuntu wa Wabanaki, si umuhuzabikorwa nyawe w'akarere k'amazi canke umuhanga mu vy'amazi, kandi ntavuga mu izina ry'ihanga, ikigo canke umuryango wa Wabanaki uwo ari wo wose.
kirundi.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Ibice bitandatu vy'akarere k'amazi, imyaka icumi, imitwaro nyayo ya Maine: inzitizi z'imigomero, amazi atemba avuye mu buhinzi, amazi y'imvura yo mu nkengero z'umuji, imyuzure n'amapfa biterwa n'ikirere.
kirundi.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Uturere tw'inkingi tuzima tukonjesha imigezi y'inkomoko. Ibishanga vy'imisamba bigabanya imyuzure kandi bisukura umugezi munini. Amazi make atemba avuye mu buhinzi yemerera uruzi guhumeka. Inzuzi zihujwe, zifite igicucu zigarura ukwimuka kwa salmon na alewife.
kirundi.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Vyagenda bite uramutse utakoze ikintu mu myaka 10?
kirundi.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: Saba umwigisha w'akarere k'amazi wa AI gusoma amakuru yawe y'akarere k'amazi
kirundi.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: Umwigisha wa siyanse y'akarere k'amazi wa AI asoma uko umeze ubu
kirundi.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Nta bikorwa biracabaho uyu mwaka. Toranya igice, toranya uburyo.
kirundi.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Iyegeranya ritihagije — bishushe cane canke vyumye cane.
kirundi.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Ubushuhe buri hejuru + ubushuhe bukonje + kuzamuka gukomeye → imvura ikomeye ya convective.
kirundi.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Hindura ubushuhe bw'igicu, ubushuhe n'umuyaga. Igikoresho gishira imvura mu bwoko bune butandukanye. Nta manota, nta kwerekana — sunika kandi witegereze.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Iciyumviro (inyandiko yisanzuye): Ni iki gitera umuyaga ugereranyije n'imvura yoroheje?
kirundi.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Imiyaga nyayo ikeneye ubushuhe no kutaba bihamye vyombi. Kora iperereza.
kirundi.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Sigura uko ubushuhe, ubushuhe n'umuyaga bifatanya kugena ubwoko bw'imvura.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso c'imvura gitandukanye c'ubwoko 4; nta manota y'igipimo c'imvura; nta kwerekana — ku bushake.
kirundi.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Uruziga rw'Amazi. Inzira ngufi za clavier: 1 kugeza 6 zitoranya intambwe, J ihindura uburyo bw'Urugendo, R U P vyitoranya inzira y'urugendo rwawe.
kirundi.switch_to_precipitation_discovery_widg: Hindukira ku gikoresho co Kuvumbura imvura
kirundi.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: urira igitonyanga kimwe uvuye mu nyanja usubira mu nyanja. Uzotangura mu nyanja, uhindagurike, urerere mu gicu, ugwe nk'imvura, hanyuma utoranye inzira ku butaka (amazi atemba y'uruzi, kwinjira munsi y'ubutaka canke kunyunyuzwa n'ikimera). Buri nzira ifata igihe gitandukanye. Soza uruziga kugira ngo wandike urugendo; uruziga 3 rwugurura ikirango c'Urugendo.
kirundi.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: Wariye molekile imwe y'amazi inzira yose — yahinduye ishusho (amazi → umwuka → amazi) ariko ntiyigeze iremwa canke isenywa. Buri gitonyanga unywa cazengurutse imyaka miriyari.
kirundi.choose_river_runoff_path_shortcut_r: Toranya inzira y'Amazi atemba y'uruzi (inzira ngufi: R)
kirundi.choose_underground_infiltration_path_s: Toranya inzira yo Kwinjira munsi y'ubutaka (inzira ngufi: U)
kirundi.choose_plant_absorption_path_shortcut_: Toranya inzira yo Kunyunyuzwa n'ikimera (inzira ngufi: P)
kirundi.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Ba igitonyanga c'amazi maze ugende mu ruziga rw'amazi rwose! Toranya kuri buri ntambwe wige siyanse iri inyuma ya buri ihindagurika.
kirundi.ask_the_ai_hydrologist_tutor: Baza umwigisha w'umuhanga mu vy'amazi wa AI
kirundi.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 Amazi arabikwa — amazi atemba + ayinjira ≈ 100% vy'imvura igera ku butaka. Nta kintu cyburirwa; afata gusa inzira zitandukanye asubira mu nyanja.
